since_last: 67% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.97%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.44% · BTC +2.35% · Gold +1.08% · Nasdaq100 +1.13%. 67% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.97%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.97%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CBRS is the standout at +9.94%
cards.body: Leaders: CBRS +9.94%, TER +9.08%, SKHY +8.51%, MU +6.92%, AMAT +5.99%. Laggards: OKTA -3.06%, WDAY -2.58%, ZBRA -2.58%, CHKP -2.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +5.39% at $126.32
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +5.39% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
